name: zentrox
description: Orchestrator only: root package-lock.json locks concurrently. front/ and back/ each have their own package.json + package-lock.json + node_modules (no workspaces).

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix front && npm install --prefix back
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --prefix front" "npm run api:watch"
